tasks.subject: Task 1: Bump Astro core to 7.x
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Astro core and official `@astrojs/*` packages are on Astro-7-compatible versions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`
- Modify: `pnpm-lock.yaml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm astro --version` reports a 7.x version
- [ ] `@astrojs/check` and `@astrojs/markdown-remark` are bumped to Astro-7-compatible versions

**Verify:** `pnpm astro --version` â†’ prints `7.x.x`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "pnpm-lock.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm astro --version", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm astro --version reports 7.x", "@astrojs/check and @astrojs/markdown-remark bumped to Astro-7-compatible versions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remove astro-robots-txt, add static robots.txt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the stale, unmaintained `astro-robots-txt` integration (last published 2023, no confirmed Astro 7 support, hooks the build pipeline) with a static `public/robots.txt` producing byte-identical output.

**Files:**
- Modify: `astro.config.mjs`
- Modify: `package.json`
- Create: `public/robots.txt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `astro.config.mjs` no longer imports or uses `astro-robots-txt`
- [ ] `package.json` no longer lists `astro-robots-txt`
- [ ] `public/robots.txt` exists with the exact pre-upgrade generated content
- [ ] `dist/robots.txt` (after build) is byte-identical to the pre-upgrade integration's output

**Verify:** `pnpm build && cat dist/robots.txt` â†’ matches exactly:
```
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://gmagnenat.com/sitemap-index.xml
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["astro.config.mjs", "package.json", "public/robots.txt"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && cat dist/robots.txt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["astro.config.mjs no longer references astro-robots-txt", "package.json no longer lists astro-robots-txt", "public/robots.txt exists with exact pre-upgrade content", "dist/robots.txt byte-identical to pre-upgrade output"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Bump astro-seo and verify astro-expressive-code
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump the one remaining third-party integration with unconfirmed-but-lower-risk Astro 7 status (`astro-seo`), and confirm `astro-expressive-code` (already Astro-7-compatible per its declared peer range, no version bump needed) still works correctly â€” specifically that the `removeUnusedThemes: false` workaround still produces both configured themes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `astro-seo` bumped to latest
- [ ] `astro-expressive-code` version UNCHANGED (still 0.44.0, already Astro-7-compatible)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds with zero errors
- [ ] Both configured themes (`dracula`, `solarized-light`) present in built CSS output

**Verify:** `pnpm build` â†’ exits 0; `grep -rl "dracula" dist/_astro/*.css && grep -rl "solarized-light" dist/_astro/*.css` â†’ both find a match

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && grep -rl 'dracula' dist/_astro/*.css && grep -rl 'solarized-light' dist/_astro/*.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["astro-seo bumped to latest", "astro-expressive-code version unchanged at 0.44.0", "pnpm build succeeds with zero errors", "both dracula and solarized-light themes present in built CSS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Build, visual, and full safety-net verification (6â†’7)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the fully-upgraded site (Astro 7, static robots.txt, bumped astro-seo) has no HTML-strictness build failures, no visible whitespace-compression regressions from the `compressHTML: 'jsx'` default change, and passes both safety-net suites unmodified.

**Files:**
- None (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds with zero errors (also serves as the HTML-strictness check)
- [ ] Manual visual check of `/posts` and one tag page shows no whitespace collapsed between tag pills or listing cards
- [ ] `pnpm test` (Vitest build-output suite) passes with zero changes to `test/build.test.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` (Playwright page-load suite) passes with zero changes to `e2e/pages.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e` â†’ both suites pass, combined exit code 0

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm build succeeds with zero errors", "manual visual check of /posts and a tag page shows no whitespace collapse", "pnpm test passes with zero changes to test/build.test.ts", "pnpm test:e2e passes with zero changes to e2e/pages.spec.ts"]}
```
